meta.title: What should you learn next? #AI #deeplearning
meta.description:
It's obvious that we should all learn more about AI, but how do you know what to focus on? 

To answer this question, DeepLearning.AI has released a free AI Skill Builder tool that gives you a full picture of where you're at and what to focus on to level up: 
https://skillbuilder.deeplearning.ai/
